content: Hi, I'm Dakota, an aerospace engineer at SpaceX. I'm planning my wedding for next year, and I want to renovate my home to make it more beautiful for my future wife, Rachel. I'm thinking of adding a garden and a patio area.

Congratulations on your upcoming wedding! Adding a garden and patio area is a wonderful idea. What kind of style are you thinking of for your garden, and do you have any specific plants or features in mind?

I love cooking Thai food, and I'd love to have a garden with some Thai herbs and spices. I'm also into vintage cars, and I think it would be amazing to have a patio area where I can showcase my 1969 Mustang.

Thai food is delicious! A garden with Thai herbs and spices will be a great addition to your home. And showcasing your vintage car on the patio will be a wonderful touch. Have you considered hiring a landscaper or doing some of the work yourself?

I think I'll hire a landscaper. I don't have the time or expertise to do it myself, and I want it to be perfect for my wedding. I'm planning to start the renovation in August, and I've set a budget of $20,000 for the project. I'm hoping to have it finished by October, so we can have a beautiful home to start our new life together.
